CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY value LIMIT 2 WITH TIES;
SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table ORDER BY value DESC) WHERE id > 1 LIMIT 4;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table ORDER BY id) LIMIT 3;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'row%') LIMIT 3;
SELECT * FROM test_table JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 'row1') AS sub ON test_table.id = sub.id LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, count(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY value) LIMIT 5 TIES;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table ORDER BY id DESC) LIMIT 3) LIMIT 2;
